title: Ipmi_Capabilities_AuthStatus
description: Ipmi_Capabilities_AuthStatus schema from Censys Platform API

anonymous_login_enabled.description: If true, the server allows anonymous login.

auth_each_message.description: If true, each message must be authenticated.

has_anonymous_users.description: If true, the server has anonymous users.

has_named_users.description: If true, the server supports named users.

user_auth_disabled.description: If true, user authentication is disabled.
